MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.title: Mash Kyrielight
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.description: A Demi-Servant fused with the Heroic Spirit Galahad. She raises the great shield Lord Camelot, hoarding Block that never crumbles and unleashing it as devastating Noble Phantasms.
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.goldMonologue: This is… provision to protect everyone, isn't it? I'll treasure it, and waste none of it.
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.eventDeathPre: I cannot… allow myself to fall. Once I've sworn to protect, I will rise again, however many times it takes, senpai.
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.aromaPrincipl: I am a shield that steps forward to guard someone's back—that is the shape of who I am.
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.cardsModifier: Play with Mash Kyrielight's card pool.
Senpai, leave this part to me. The shield hasn't wavered yet—so please, move forward without fear.
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.banter.dead.e: My… breath is failing—forgive me, senpai. Even so… this shield, at least, I will not lower.
